page: Amazon Web Services p5.48xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance designed for intensive parallel computing workloads. It features 192 vCPUs powered by AMD processors with an x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 3.6 GHz across 96 physical cores with simultaneous multithreading. The instance is built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation and minimal virtualization overhead.

The system is equipped with 2048.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 10.67 GB of RAM per physical core. Acceleration is driven by eight NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs, delivering a combined 640 GB of high-bandwidth video memory. For local data storage, the instance includes 30400 GB of NVMe SSD capacity, supporting high-throughput local read and write operations.

Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps. This combination of massive GPU memory, high-speed local NVMe storage, and dense CPU resources positions the instance for large-scale machine learning training, complex scientific simulations, high-performance computing tasks, and large language model workloads.
description: Amazon Web Services p5.48xlarge is a high-density, GPU-accelerated instance built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features 192 vCPUs powered by 3.6 GHz AMD processors with 96 physical cores and dedicated CPU allocation. The hardware configuration includes 2048.0 GB of system memory and eight NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs, providing a total of 640 GB of VRAM. For high-speed local data access, the instance is equipped with 30400 GB of NVMe SSD storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps. This resource profile is designed for demanding parallel processing tasks, including large-scale machine learning model training, deep learning inference, and complex scientific simulations.
og_description: Amazon Web Services p5.48xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 192 vCPUs, 2048 GB of RAM, eight NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs with 640 GB VRAM, and 30400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage.

tagline: A high-density accelerator instance combining eight NVIDIA H100 GPUs, 192 vCPUs, and 30.4 TB of local NVMe SSD storage.
bullet_points: Eight NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs with 640 GB total VRAM
192 vCPUs powered by 3.6 GHz AMD processors
30400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Designed for machine learning training and scientific simulations
